title: micromeles hudsonii
intro: Micromeles hudsonii, also known as the Chinese hawthorn tree, is a deciduous shrub native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and high cholesterol levels due to its high content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidin (OPC) compounds. The health benefits of Micromeles hudsonii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting liver function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Micromeles hudsonii often involve dried berries, leaves, or bark that can be steeped in hot water to make a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal formula.
